dangerSubscriptionForm.errorNameRequired: Give this subscription a short name (e.g. Home, Work, Route to office).
dangerSubscriptionForm.errorLatLngRequired: Centre lat/lng are required for zone and point subscriptions.
dangerSubscriptionForm.typeRoute: Route — set up from the map (coming soon)
dangerSubscriptionForm.hintRadius: Between 100 m and 50 km. Default 1500 m for zones, 500 m for points.
dangerSubscriptionForm.checkNotifyReports: Notify me about new accident reports
dangerSubscriptionForm.checkNotifyHighRisk: Notify me when overall risk crosses my threshold

alertsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search for an incident, a road, a wilaya...
alertsPage.profileBio: Browse live road reports and share updates from the field.
alertsPage.pageDescription: Manage database-backed alert rules for wilayas, communes, and radius zones.

empty.title: No Alerts
empty.description: Create your first alert to get notified.

push.descOff: System alerts are currently off for this browser.
push.descAll: Medium and high-risk watched-zone alerts will appear as browser notifications.
push.descImportantOnly: Only high-risk watched-zone alerts will appear as browser notifications.
push.optionAllCopy: Includes medium and high-risk watched-zone incidents.
push.noticeAllMode: System alerts now include medium and high-risk watched-zone incidents.
push.noticeImportantOnlyMode: System alerts now focus on high-risk watched-zone incidents.
push.noticeTurnedOff: System alerts turned off for this browser.
push.noActiveSubscription: No active browser subscription was found for your account on this browser.
push.testAlertSent: Test alert sent. Check your browser notifications.
push.notSupportedError: System notifications are not supported in this browser.

email.descDefault: Choose which SIARA emails should reach your inbox.
email.descAllOff: Email updates are currently turned off except for required transactional messages.
email.descSome: Weekly summaries, product updates, and optional marketing emails are controlled here.
email.weeklySummaryCopy: Sunday evening recap of incidents and trigger activity in your watched zones.
email.productUpdatesCopy: Occasional SIARA improvements, release notes, and feature updates.
email.marketingUpdatesCopy: Optional announcements about SIARA campaigns and outreach.

noSelection.title: No Alert Selected
noSelection.description: Select an alert from the list to view live zone details and recent trigger activity.

errors.unableToLoadPushSettings: Unable to load system alert settings.
errors.unableToDisablePush: Unable to turn off system alerts.
errors.unableToSendTestAlert: Unable to send a test system alert right now.

high.label: High
high.desc: Urgent incidents that need immediate attention.

immediate.label: Immediate
immediate.desc: Receive a notification as soon as a matching incident is detected.

digest.label: Digest
digest.desc: Bundle incidents in a summary so you receive fewer notifications.

firstOnly.label: First only
firstOnly.desc: Notify on the first matching incident, then silence repeated updates.

delivery.inAppDesc: Appear inside your SIARA notification center.
delivery.emailDesc: Send matching alerts to your account email.
delivery.smsDesc: Text message delivery when your account supports it.

createAlertPage.searchPlaceholder: Search for an incident, a road, a wilaya...

trustNotice.title: Secure alerts
trustNotice.desc: Only incidents matching your selected filters and area trigger notifications.

step1.title: What type of alert do you want to create?
step1.subtitle: Select one or more categories that match your alert.
step1.hint: Select an alert type to continue.

step2.title: Where should SIARA watch?
step2.subtitle: Wilaya, commune, or a radius around a point.

step3.title: Conditions
step3.subtitle: Choose severity and schedule.
step3.severityHint: Select at least one severity level.

step4.title: Frequency
step4.subtitle: Set how often SIARA should notify you.
step4.highVolumeDesc: Immediate alerts can be frequent during peak incidents.
step4.autoDeliveryNote: Delivery channels are managed automatically by your account notification settings.

step5.title: Confirmation
step5.subtitle: Review your alert settings before saving.
step5.readyBanner: Your alert is ready. Click {{action}} to activate it.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.whyText: SIARA will notify you when {{types}} incidents match your filters in {{zone}}.
preview.whyTextIncomplete: Complete the steps to see a personalized explanation.

dangerSubscriptionsPage.title: Danger subscriptions
dangerSubscriptionsPage.subtitle: Get alerted when accidents are reported or risk rises in zones, points, or routes you care about.
dangerSubscriptionsPage.emptyState: You don't have any danger subscriptions yet. Click + New subscription to get alerts for a zone, point, or route.
